creator: zirias@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jesús Daniel Colmenares Oviedo from comment #7)

Thanks, looking good!

Just one thing, now the pkg install message doesn't really say anything. In that case, it should be removed completely. Or otherwise if you think something is indeed "vital to setup and operation" in the sense of the handbook, just add that bit of information. Up to you to decide, you know the software better than me. The whole point is to keep it relatively short and only mention what's absolutely necessary, mostly because there are potentially lots of these messages displayed after an install :)
